See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 29022 => 'Jamestown', 29023 => 'St. Helena', 29024 => 'St. Helena', 290264 => 'St. Helena', 290265 => 'St. Helena', 290266 => 'St. Helena', 290267 => 'St. Helena', 290268 => 'St. Helena', 290269 => 'St. Helena', 29027 => 'St. Helena', 2908 => 'Tristan da Cunha', ];
